title: SlimeRange
description: Turns minecraft world into Slime Rancher
body:
# 🌸Shortly

With this mod you can create a slime ranch with cute slimes.

Before playing this mod, you should know about Slime Rancher game.

If you have questions, need help or just want to talk to mod author, join our [discord server](https://discord.gg/KFpPXrJXrZ).

## ✅ Main features:
- Slimes from Slime Rancher. They have custom model, animations and sound. They have hunger system, so you need to feed them. You can know if they are hungry by looking at their face. They are eating laying items and giving plorts for them. Some of them prefer different kinds of food. If they eat a plort of another slime, they become a largo slime.
- Slime types. Different slime types give slimes different appearances. Some slimes, like tabby slime, can change slimes' mechanics.
- Largo slimes. They hold two slime types at once. Their appearance is automatically generated, so there are all variants that can be. Their appearance can be different from one in original game, because it's impossible to control every slime's appearance.
- Plort market for selling plorts and slime shop to buy slimes. You can buy them from a farmer villager. Plort market prices update every minute.

## 🍏 Current state:
- This mod currently adds content only to creative mode.
- 4 slimes (10 total variants): pink, rock, tabby, phosphor.

## ⌚️ Plans for nearest future:
- Add all slime types from original game.
- Different dimensions for all the custom biomes.
- Plort market, shop system, progression.
- Add ability to create addons.
- Slimepedia and other things to learn the mod.
- Add rewards for creating a ranch and feeding slimes.
